candidate_definition_hints.text: Vulkan DOOM 3 port based on DOOM 3 BFG Edition

I have not had the time to maintain this to keep pace as a learning tool for Vulkan. There are still some good nuggets in here for beginners and it's a sizable chunk of code utilizing the API. However, it's years behind the API updates so it's not going to inform you on recent b…
